source_pr.title: server: add HTTP API to enable/disable async commit and 1PC
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

After upgrading a TiDB cluster, tools like tiup may automatically enable async commit in a cluster. 
Tools cannot set global variables directly, so we need to provide an API to do it.

Related issue: https://github.com/tikv/sig-transaction/issues/75

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:

Two HTTP APIs were added:

```shell
curl -X POST -d "tidb_enable_async_commit=1" http://{TiDBIP}:10080/settings
curl -X POST -d "tidb_enable_async_commit=0" http://{TiDBIP}:10080/settings
```

```shell
curl -X POST -d "tidb_enable_1pc=1" http://{TiDBIP}:10080/settings
curl -X POST -d "tidb_enable_1pc=1" http://{TiDBIP}:10080/settings
```


### Related changes

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
